name: Faithful Autoformalization of Natural Language Assertions
summary: arXiv:2607.13303v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Formal contracts are essential for software testing and verification, yet writing them remains labor-intensive and error-prone. LLMs offer a promis...
description: arXiv:2607.13303v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Formal contracts are essential for software testing and verification, yet writing them remains labor-intensive and error-prone. LLMs offer a promising path toward autoformalization: synthesizing executable assertions from natural-language specifications and thereby bridging the gap between informal developer intent and formal executable specific...
author: Hongyi Liu, Madhusudan Parthasarathy, Adithya Murali
